data.name: A built-in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system for fine-grained permission management.
data.value: Ett inbyggt rollbaserat åtkomstkontrollsystem (RBAC) för detaljerad behörighetshantering.

data.name: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management right out of the box.
data.value: En komplett lösning för användarautentisering och profilanpassning direkt ur lådan.

data.name: A fully responsive layout that looks great on both desktop and mobile devices.
data.value: En helt responsiv layout som ser bra ut på både skrivbord och mobila enheter.

data.name: A modern, feature-rich, and highly extensible foundation for your next web application.
data.value: En modern, funktionsrik och mycket utbyggbar grund för din nästa webbapplikation.

data.name: A simple tool to convert your Markdown into clean, sanitized HTML.
data.value: Ett enkelt verktyg för att konvertera din Markdown till ren, saniterad HTML.

data.name: After making this document private, the existing public link will no longer work. Are you sure you want to proceed?
data.value: Om du gör detta dokument privat kommer den befintliga publika länken inte längre att fungera. Är du säker på att du vill fortsätta?

data.name: All dependencies are automatically registered and always available via constructor injection.
data.value: Alla beroenden registreras automatiskt och är alltid tillgängliga via konstruktorinjektion.

data.name: An error occurred. Please try again.
data.value: Ett fel uppstod. Var god försök igen.

data.name: Are you sure you want to make this document private?
data.value: Är du säker på att du vill göra detta dokument privat?

data.name: Automatic, AI-driven translation into 28 languages for global reach.
data.value: Automatisk, AI-driven översättning till 28 språk för global räckvidd.

data.name: Comes with full Docker support for simplified, consistent, and reliable deployments.
data.value: Levererar fullt Docker-stöd för förenklade, konsekventa och pålitliga distributioner.

data.name: Easily switch between providers like SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.
data.value: Enkelt växla mellan leverantörer som SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server och ett minnesbaserat databassystem för testning.

data.name: Failed to copy link.
data.value: Det gick inte att kopiera länken.

data.name: Failed to copy text.
data.value: Det gick inte att kopiera text.

data.name: Failed to make document private. Please try again.
data.value: Det gick inte att göra dokumentet privat. Försök igen.

data.name: Failed to make document public. Please try again.
data.value: Det gick inte att göra dokumentet offentligt. Vänligen försök igen.

data.name: Failed to update privacy settings.
data.value: Det gick inte att uppdatera sekretessinställningarna.

data.name: Features a built-in file management system with automatic avatar compression.
data.value: Har ett inbyggt filhanteringssystem med automatisk komprimering av avatarer.

data.name: HTML preview will appear here after conversion.
If you make this document private, the existing public link will immediately stop working for everyone.
data.value: Om du gör detta dokument privat kommer den befintliga publika länken omedelbart att sluta fungera för alla.

data.name: Includes extensive documentation and practical examples to get you started quickly.
data.value: Inkluderar omfattande dokumentation och praktiska exempel för att du snabbt ska komma igång.

data.name: Localize
data.value:
@using Aiursoft.MoongladeV2.Controllers @model Aiursoft.MoongladeV2.Models.HomeViewModels.IndexViewModel @inject Aiursoft.MoongladeV2.Services.FileStorage.StorageService Storage @{ var isDarkMode = Context.Request.Cookies[ThemeController.ThemeCookieKey] == true.ToString(); } @if (Model.SavedSuccessfully) {
@Localizer["Success!"] @Localizer["Post updated successfully."]
}
@Localizer["Saved successfully!"]
@Localizer["Image upload failed!"]
@Html.AntiForgeryToken()
@* Desktop View Switcher *@
``` But the user explicitly said: "Please translate only the sentence or word `Localize` in the paragraph into the target language sv-SE, Svenska (Sverige)." Now, we need to check: Is `Localize` a word that appears in the paragraph? The paragraph seems to be code that uses `@Localizer` (a C# variable for localization). The user wrote `Localize` as a word (maybe a string literal inside `@Localizer["..."]`). However, the only place "Localize" could be is in the code snippet but not explicitly shown. There is no string "Localize" inside the paragraph. Could be that they want to translate the word "Localize" itself (the verb "Localize"?). Or they might want to translate "Localize" string which is used as a placeholder for a tab title? Actually the paragraph is a code snippet showing how the view uses localizer. But the word "Localize" itself is not present in the paragraph. The only occurrence is the code snippet `Localizer`, which is not a string to translate. Could be that the user expects that "Localize" is a placeholder word that they need to translate for a different context (like a button or label). Maybe they have omitted the string "Localize" in the paragraph and they want translation for that. Let's think: The user wants to translate a sentence or word `Localize` in the paragraph. They may have "Localize" somewhere in the view? Actually, no. The paragraph includes many string literals inside `@Localizer["..."]`. The "Localize" could be a string literal "Localize"? The paragraph doesn't show it. Could it be that the user mistakenly omitted the string "Localize"? The user says: "Please translate only the sentence or word `Localize` in the paragraph." Could be they want to translate "Localize" (verb) into Swedish. So translation: "Lokalisera". In Swedish, "localize" (verb) is "lokalisera". Or maybe "Lokaliser"? But "Localize" in English can be "Lokalisera". Or "Översätt"? But "Localize" as a verb meaning "to make local". In Swedish, "lokalisera" is a direct translation of "to localize". So the translation could be "Lokalisera". So we need to output that. But also note the instruction: "Human names, Nicknames, Proper nouns, symbols, trademarks, etc. must be output as it is and do not translate them! So please consider if the sentence or word `Localize` is one of them." So "Localize" is not a proper noun; it's a generic word. So we translate it. The user wants only the translated content. Output must be wrapped in three backticks. Thus the answer: "Lokalisera". But let's double-check translation nuance. "Localize" could also be "Lokalisera". In Swedish, "localization" is "lokalisering". The verb "to localize" is "lokalisera". So translation: "Lokalisera". That's it. Thus the final output is: ``` Lokalisera ``` Make sure to wrap in three backticks. One more nuance: The user said "Please translate only the sentence or word `Localize` in the paragraph into the target language sv-SE, Svenska (Sverige)." If there is no such word, they may want to output "Localize" as is. But the user explicitly said they want translation; if no instance of "Localize" exists, maybe they want to translate the word "Localize" anyway. So it's okay. Thus output exactly: ``` Lokalisera ``` Wrap in triple backticks. Proceed accordingly. ``` Lokalisera

data.name: Seamlessly integrate with any OpenID Connect provider, with automatic role synchronization.
data.value: Integrera sömlöst med vilken OpenID Connect-leverantör som helst, med automatisk rollsynkronisering.

data.name: Share this document publicly with a unique link that anyone can access without logging in.
data.value: Dela detta dokument offentligt med en unik länk som vem som helst kan komma åt utan att logga in.

data.name: Smart dark mode that automatically adapts to the user's system settings.
data.value: Smart mörkt läge som automatiskt anpassar sig efter användarens systeminställningar.

data.name: The navigation bar automatically adjusts based on user roles and permissions.
data.value: Navigeringsfältet anpassas automatiskt baserat på användarroller och behörigheter.

data.name: This is a template project, where we start the voyager...
data.value: Det här är ett mallprojekt, där vi startar resan...
